purpose: Design the PREO + SCO merge gate before branch protection integration.
invariant: No valid merge object -> source-control mutation remains illegitimate

tasks.name: PREO workflow design
tasks.objective: Convert PR evidence into a PREO candidate bound to the exact PR head SHA.
validity_rules: PREO candidate must bind exact head_sha
PREO candidate cannot authorize a different PR
PREO candidate cannot authorize a different head_sha

tasks.name: SCO workflow design
tasks.objective: Require SCO candidate when governed paths change.
validity_rules: SCO candidate required when governed_paths are changed
SCO candidate must bind exact changed files
SCO candidate scope cannot exceed declared files
SCO candidate must classify mutation risk

tasks.name: merge-governance workflow design
tasks.objective: Check PREO, SCO, status checks, and merge proof declarations before merge legitimacy exists.
checks: PREO head SHA matches current PR head SHA
SCO exists when governed paths changed
SCO changed files match actual changed files
validity_rules: governed path mutation without SCO -> NULL

tasks.name: enforcement boundary classification
tasks.objective: Classify current merge governance enforcement maturity.
classification_rules: advisory = workflow exists but branch protection does not require it
branch_protected_enforcement = direct push restricted and status checks required
non_bypassable_enforcement = no alternate source-control mutation path exists

tasks.name: branch protection integration
tasks.objective: Integrate merge governance into branch protection only after Tasks A-D are stable.
